allow: Bash(mysql -u root -e "SELECT d.id, d.name, d.created_at, CASE WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Semental' WHEN b.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Reproductora' ELSE 'Galgo' END AS tipo FROM galgospedia.dogs d LEFT JOIN galgospedia.stallions s ON s.dog_id = d.id LEFT JOIN galgospedia.broodmares b ON b.dog_id = d.id ORDER BY d.id ASC;")
